---
title: "Assessment brief: Lab Notebook"
bibliography: ../tds.bib
number-sections: true
---

## Assessment in brief

###  Module code and title

**TRAN5340M** - Transport Data Science

###  Assessment title

Summative Coursework: Lab Notebook

###  Assessment type

Lab Notebook (LN)

###  Deadline

**Submission deadline**: [TBC]

### Guidance

For guidance on the full assessment structure, please refer to the [Assessment Overview](../assessment-overview.qmd) and the [Report Assessment Brief](../d3/assessment-brief.qmd).

### Submission requirements

- Weighting: **30%** of module mark
- Required content: data visualisation notebook with a data pipeline diagram showing input data sources and selected methods
- Length and formatting details: **[TBC]**
